This section is currently being prepared.\

<<<<<<< HEAD
It will present my academic work, including publications, research contributions, and ongoing projects.\  

In the meantime, you can  check my official webpage at [Toulouse School of Economics](https://www.tse-fr.eu/people/christophe-bontemps?tab=bio-and-research-interests){target="_blank"}\

=======
In the meantime, you can  check my official webpage at [Toulouse School of Economics](https://www.tse-fr.eu/people/christophe-bontemps?tab=bio-and-research-interests){target="_blank"}\
>>>>>>> b4e9da5a4027fe532a11c49d0f5fc3e4302aa0c2


Please check back soon.
